text.tspan: ABSOLUTE CARNAGE
@liuzhen9320 goes on mass deletion spree, removing 1,204 lines of legacy auth code
NOT A DRILL
@liuzhen9320 deploys JWT sessions to prod on a Wednesday. Bold move.
EXPERTS BAFFLED
@liuzhen9320 reviews 8 PRs before lunch. Coworkers reportedly stunned.
DEVELOPING
@liuzhen9320 spotted pushing commits at an alarming rate. 42 this week alone.
UNPRECEDENTED
@liuzhen9320 migrates three repos to OAuth2 PKCE in what sources call a historic sprint
